glosses.vi: nữ vận động viên; nữ tuyển thủ
glosses.ja: 女子選手; 女性アスリート

translations.vi: Em gái tôi là vận động viên.
translations.ja: 私の妹はスポーツ選手です。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner modifying 'Schwester'; agrees in gender (feminine), number (singular), case (nominative) with the head noun; marks possession.
Common noun; head of the subject noun phrase; nominative singular feminine.
Copular auxiliary; 3rd person singular present; links the subject to the predicate nominal.
Common noun used as a predicate nominal (predicative complement) with 'sein'; nominative singular feminine.

sentences.target: Die Sportlerin trainiert jeden Morgen im Park.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈʃpɔʁtləʁɪn tʁaˈniːɐ̯t ˈjeːdən ˈmɔʁɡn̩ ɪm paʁk/

translations.de: Die Sportlerin trainiert jeden Morgen im Park.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈʃpɔʁtləʁɪn tʁaˈniːɐ̯t ˈjeːdən ˈmɔʁɡn̩ ɪm paʁk/
translations.en: The athlete trains every morning in the park.
translations.es: La deportista entrena cada mañana en el parque.
translations.fr: L’athlète s’entraîne tous les matins au parc.
translations.it: L’atleta si allena ogni mattina al parco.
translations.ko: 그 운동선수는 매일 아침 공원에서 훈련해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 这位运动员每天早上在公园训练。
translations.yue: 嗰位運動員每日朝早喺公園訓練。
translations.ru: Спортсменка тренируется каждое утро в парке.
translations.pt: A atleta treina todas as manhãs no parque.
translations.tr: Sporcu her sabah parkta antrenman yapıyor.
translations.vi: Nữ vận động viên tập luyện mỗi sáng ở công viên.
translations.ar: الرياضية تتمرن כל صباح في الحديقة.
translations.nl: De atlete traint elke ochtend in het park.
translations.hu: A sportoló minden reggel a parkban edz.
translations.hi: खिलाड़ी हर सुबह पार्क में प्रशिक्षण करती है.
translations.pl: Sportsmenka trenuje każdego ranka w parku.
translations.el: Η αθλήτρια προπονείται κάθε πρωί στο πάρκο.
translations.nb: Idrettsutøveren trener hver morgen i parken.
translations.id: Atlet itu berlatih setiap pagi di taman.
translations.sv: Idrottaren tränar varje morgon i parken.
translations.ro: Sportiva se antrenează în fiecare dimineață în parc.
translations.cs: Sportovkyně trénuje každé ráno v parku.
translations.da: Atleten træner hver morgen i parken.
translations.ja: そのスポーツ選手は毎朝公園で練習します。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; feminine singular nominative; introduces the subject NP 'Sportlerin'.
Common noun; subject of the finite verb; nominative singular feminine.
Finite lexical verb; 3rd person singular present; intransitive here, expressing habitual action.
Attributive determiner modifying 'Morgen'; accusative masculine singular (temporal accusative).
Common noun; forms a temporal accusative NP ('jeden Morgen') functioning as an adverbial.
Preposition (contraction of 'in dem') selecting dative; introduces the locative PP.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'im'; dative masculine singular.

sentences.target: Ich helfe der Sportlerin mit dem Umzug.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈhɛlfə deːɐ̯ ˈʃpɔʁtləʁɪn mɪt deːm ˈʊmtsuːk/

translations.de: Ich helfe der Sportlerin mit dem Umzug.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈhɛlfə deːɐ̯ ˈʃpɔʁtləʁɪn mɪt deːm ˈʊmtsuːk/
translations.en: I’m helping the athlete with the move.
translations.es: Estoy ayudando a la deportista con la mudanza.
translations.it: Sto aiutando l’atleta con il trasloco.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在帮这位运动员搬家。
translations.yue: 我喺幫嗰位運動員搬屋。
translations.pt: Estou ajudando a atleta com a mudança.
translations.vi: Tôi đang giúp nữ vận động viên chuyển nhà.
translations.nl: Ik help de atlete met de verhuizing.
translations.hi: मैं खिलाड़ी को घर बदलने में मदद कर रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Βοηθάω την αθλήτρια με τη μετακόμιση.
translations.ro: O ajut pe sportivă cu mutarea.
translations.ja: 私はそのスポーツ選手の引っ越しを手伝っています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular; subject in nominative case.
Finite lexical verb; 1st person singular present; subcategorizes for a dative object.
Definite article; dative feminine singular; introduces the indirect object NP.
Common noun; indirect object of 'helfen'; dative singular feminine.
Preposition selecting dative; introduces an instrumental/comitative PP.
Definite article; dative masculine singular; modifies 'Umzug'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'mit'; dative masculine singular (meaning relocation).

sentences.target: Du kennst die Sportlerin aus unserer Stadt.
sentences.reading: /duː kɛnst diː ˈʃpɔʁtləʁɪn aʊ̯s ˈʊnzəʁɐ ʃtat/

translations.de: Du kennst die Sportlerin aus unserer Stadt.
translations.ipa: /duː kɛnst diː ˈʃpɔʁtləʁɪn aʊ̯s ˈʊnzəʁɐ ʃtat/
translations.en: You know the athlete from our city.
translations.es: Conoces a la deportista de nuestra ciudad.
translations.fr: Tu connais l’athlète de notre ville.
translations.ko: 너는 우리 도시의 운동선수를 알고 있어.
translations.zh-Hans: 你认识我们城市的那位运动员。
translations.yue: 你識我哋城市嗰位運動員。
translations.ru: Ты знаешь спортсменку из нашего города.
translations.pt: Você conhece a atleta da nossa cidade.
translations.he: אתה מכיר את הספורטאית מהעיר שלנו.
translations.vi: Bạn biết cô vận động viên của thành phố chúng ta.
translations.nl: Jij kent de atlete uit onze stad.
translations.uk: Ти знаєш спортсменку з нашого міста.
translations.hi: तुम हमारे शहर की उस खिलाड़ी को जानते हो.
translations.el: Ξέρεις την αθλήτρια από την πόλη μας.
translations.nb: Du kjenner atleten fra byen vår.
translations.id: Kamu kenal atlet dari kota kita.
translations.sv: Du känner idrottaren från vår stad.
translations.ro: O cunoști pe sportiva din orașul nostru.
translations.da: Du kender atleten fra vores by.
translations.ja: あなたは私たちの街のあのスポーツ選手を知っています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 2nd person singular; subject in nominative case.
Finite lexical verb; 2nd person singular present; transitive, taking an accusative direct object.
Definite article; accusative feminine singular; introduces the direct object NP.
Common noun; direct object of 'kennst'; accusative singular feminine.
Preposition selecting dative; introduces a source/origin PP.
Possessive determiner modifying 'Stadt'; dative feminine singular (agreement with head noun).
Common noun; object of the preposition 'aus'; dative singular feminine.
